# Physical Interface with Switchport Trunk
-- interfaces/eth1-10 --
apiVersion: networking.metal.ironcore.dev/v1alpha1
kind: Interface
metadata:
  name: eth1-10
  namespace: default
spec:
  deviceRef:
    name: device
  name: eth1/10
  description: vPC to Host1
  adminState: Up
  type: Physical
  mtu: 1500
  switchport:
    mode: Trunk
    nativeVlan: 1
    allowedVlans: [10]
-- state --
{
  "openconfig-interfaces:interfaces": {
    "interface": [
      {
        "name": "eth1/10",
        "config": {
          "description": "vPC to Host1",
          "enabled": true,
          "mtu": 1500,
          "name": "eth1/10",
          "tpid": "TPID_0X8100",
          "type": "iana-if-type:ethernetCsmacd"
        },
        "openconfig-if-ethernet:ethernet": {
          "openconfig-vlan:switched-vlan": {
            "config": {
              "interface-mode": "TRUNK",
              "native-vlan": 1,
              "trunk-vlans": [10]
            }
          }
        }
      }
    ]
  }
}
